property.name: java.library.path
property.value: D:\jdk-25.0.2\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\tgs9311\.codex\tmp\arg0\codex-arg05zWXOY;D:\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA GPU Computing Toolkit\CUDA\v12.8\bin;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA GPU Computing Toolkit\CUDA\v12.8\libnvvp;D:\Vulkan\Bin;D:\jdk-25.0.2\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;D:\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\CMake\bin;C:\Program Files\Wolfram Research\WolframScript\;C:\Program Files\gsudo\Current;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\Nsight Compute 2025.1.0\;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA app\NvDLISR;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;D:\WinSCP\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\sbt\bin;D:\nodejs\;C:\Users\tgs9311\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\tgs9311\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Users\tgs9311\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;D:\Microsoft VS Code\bin;D:\pandoc-3.4;D:\mingw\w64devkit\bin;D:\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.1.2\bin;;D:\mysys2\mingw64\bin;C:\Users\tgs9311\AppData\Roaming\npm;c:\Users\tgs9311\.vscode\extensions\openai.chatgpt-26.325.31654-win32-x64\bin\windows-x86_64;.

testcase.name: guest access sessions can submit club applications with anonymous identity
pending club applications can be withdrawn by their original actor
scheduling a stage creates one four-player table
recording a completed table updates player elo and dashboards
advanced stats pipeline computes exact sample metadata from detailed paifu
advanced stats pipeline retries failed tasks and dead-letters after max attempts
advanced stats backfill mode targets only missing boards
stage lineups preserve represented club for multi-club players
secondary club dashboards refresh after a member match result
club titles can be cleared after assignment with audit trail
registering players and managing club rosters initializes dashboards and power rating
global dictionary can tune club power formula at runtime
global dictionary can tune rating calculation at runtime
global dictionary provides default tournament payout ratios
tournament settlement supports revisions draft finalization and club-share adjustments
appeal workflow emits moderation and notification cascade records
appeal workflow supports triage assignment overdue tracking and reopening
dictionary updates and player bans repair club projections and emit cascade records
dictionary namespace workflow governs metadata writes while runtime registry stays strict
dictionary namespace collaborators can write metadata and co-owners can manage editors
dictionary namespace ownership rejects suspended or banned owners
dictionary namespace backlog tracks pending overdue and due-soon reviews
dictionary namespace reminder processing emits due-soon and escalated actions without spamming
dictionary namespace explicit context club governs collaborators transfers and writes
global dictionary normalizes ranks in the public player leaderboard
stage lineup preferred winds influence scheduled seats
club operations update treasury point pool and rank tree
club member contributions resolve effective rank privileges
delegated club rank privileges unlock roster bank and lineup operations
multi-round scheduling respects pool size and advances rounds incrementally
reserve lineup seats backfill unavailable active players during scheduling
swiss pairingMethod can switch from balanced elo to snake grouping
round robin stages rotate dedicated table pods across rounds
custom stages honor targetTableCount for scheduling and completion
swiss maxRounds limits scheduling horizon and completion requirements
knockout seeding policy can follow rating instead of ranking order
club relations stay reciprocal when updated or cleared
swiss standings can reset each round when carryOverPoints is disabled
table seat readiness and disconnect workflow gates table start
club honors can be awarded and revoked with audit trail
round settlement validation and match record notes are populated from paifu
